purpose: Reusable scaffold for optimizing decisions when objective or constraints are evaluated by simulation, stochastic rollout, or expensive black-box evaluation.
intended_use: Copy this folder when the selected method requires simulation-based policy evaluation, black-box optimization, ranking and selection, Bayesian optimization, SPSA, evolutionary search, or surrogate-assisted optimization.
Fill simulator, policy, search, baseline, evaluation, and run-record contracts for the confirmed task.
Use common random numbers, replications, confidence intervals, and pilot checks to avoid overfitting to simulation noise.
non_goals: This asset is not a complete simulator or optimizer.
This asset does not treat naive random search as automatically sufficient.
This asset does not replace exact optimization when exact feasibility and bounds are central.
This asset must not be used to generate toy or minimal examples that omit replications, seed control, baselines, uncertainty reporting, progress output, and out-of-sample evaluation.

top_level_paths.simulator: Simulator contract and stochastic replication notes.
top_level_paths.search: Simulation optimization algorithm catalog and search contract.
top_level_paths.data: Input instance, seed, and scenario data notes.
top_level_paths.scripts: Foreground run and compact result-collection templates.
top_level_paths.run_records: Structured simulation optimization run logging templates.
